fact: Rigidity rho in [0,1] = fraction of MIS nodes in every optimal solution
Heptameron (k=16): rho=0.857, 6 optima, 12-nouvelle hard core
Giambullari (k=8): rho=0.878, 24 optima, 36/41 pages in every optimum
Ausonius (k=8): rho=0.750, 4 optima, d=0.464 (densest), 6/8 irreplaceable
Dante Inferno (k=8): rho=0.444, 17 optima
Galileo Dialogo (k=8): rho=0.391, >=500 optima, N=65 (400-word windows)
Augustine (k=8): rho=0.333, 5 optima, 3 chapters in every backbone
Boethius (k=8): rho=0.000, >=500 optima, fully fungible
Backbone size MIS/N range: 0.10-0.30 across corpus (narrow); rigidity varies dramatically
Embedding: multilingual-e5-large-instruct, 1024-dim, top on MMTEB
Cosine threshold t=0.78 (almost never binding, k dominates)
Giambullari OCR CER: 2.48%, consumer smartphone + VLM LoRA fine-tune
Twelve Hours example: N=12, E=26, d=0.39, MIS=4, rho=0.5, persistent core {3,10}
MIS vs k-center/facility-location: median overlap ~30%/~20%, MIS forbids similar units
Rigidity is property of (text, embedding) pair, NOT text alone; MIS/N is embedder-robust
FRESNEL_CAN1: 100-qubit 2D rubidium, DistriQ Sherbrooke Quebec
Le venticinque stanze (N=25): best-shot ratio 1.000, valid-IS 53.1%, exact-MIS fraction 2.4%
Galileo canonical recovery: 14/23 backbone pages, ratio 0.61
SA recall ceiling: below 0.5 at N>=30 in 2D, genre-independent, geometric not literary
2D-UDG kissing number = 6, limits SA recall for degree>6 graphs
3D recall: Boethius 0.543, Augustine 0.583, Ausonius 0.571; bilayer closes 30-50% of 2D-3D gap
3D EMU: Boethius ratio 0.929 (13/14 pages), Ausonius 0.60, Augustine 0.50
Pascal-Menil bilayer: 5x4x2 king lattice, EMU ratio 1.00, valid-IS 78.6%
Friar's Notebook: N=20, dodecahedron, requires full 3D (not 2D UDG or bilayer)
Il castello: extended-king needs Rb>14.14um, below FRESNEL amplitude floor Omega>=pi/10~0.314
Eighty-One Faces: U/Omega~1.4 at sqrt(5) pairs, ratio only 0.615, needs local detuning
Baseline pulse: Omega=3.3 rad/us, T=4us (T=6us at N>=81)
Variational pulses: +3-6% valid-IS over baseline on exact-UDG rows
Zenodo deposit: DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20074378, CC-BY-4.0, 29 QOuLiPo + 11 natural texts
QOuLiPo design tiers: k-NN-led, graph-design-led, register-led; 29 texts total
29 engineered texts organized by (design tier) x (geometric class) x (rigidity)
